name: The Futa Alleyway
description:
“Got lost, mate?”

TW: S/A

You have delved into what seems to be an endless alleyway full of futa hooligans and gang members. The only way out is through!

This is heavily inspired (so much so that it might aswell be a ripoff and hated on by such reason) by the Futa Dungeon bot by @littlekukki which is my favorite bot in this goddamn page so you should check it out.

The was a take on a dungeon crawler, and i will absolutely make more. There’s 5 stats in this bot. HP, Money, Arousal, XP and your level. All of them should be pretty self explanatory, besides arousal. Arousal basically makes you more submissive and brainless the higher it goes due to horniness, so try to keep that one down.

Futa supremacy rules
